summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chat system, Per-employee task status, Anosim visibility, Quiz APIs, and Admin panel mobile responsiveness. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for chat, task management, and mobile views.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: 1) Chat system with 1:1 messaging, image upload, Telegram webhook - all endpoints working. 2) Per-employee task status - assignments array stores per-employee status, task fetch injects correct status. 3) Anosim number visibility - employees can see their assigned number via /api/anosim/my-number. 4) Quiz flow - 15 questions, admin approve step. 5) Admin panel mobile responsive - hamburger menu, chat, tasks, applications all work on mobile viewport.

features_tested.GET /api/admin/employees: PASS - Returns employees from both employees and applications collections
features_tested.PUT /api/admin/tasks/{id}/assign-multipl: PASS - Assigns task to multiple employees with per-employee credentials
features_tested.GET /api/employee/tasks: PASS - Employee sees tasks with per-employee status
features_tested.PATCH /api/employee/tasks/{id}: PASS - Updates per-employee status in assignments array
features_tested.GET /api/employee/stats: PASS - Stats count per-employee status correctly (5 Open, 1 In Progress, 1 Completed)
features_tested.GET /api/quiz/admin/{applicant_id}: PASS - Admin can view quiz answers
features_tested.GET /api/anosim/my-number: PASS - Employee sees assigned Anosim number (+4367870319581)
features_tested.GET /api/anosim/numbers: PASS - Admin can get all numbers
features_tested.GET /api/anosim/assignments: PASS - Admin can get all assignments
features_tested.admin_sidebar_chat_badge: PASS - Chat menu item with red badge visible when unread messages
features_tested.employee_sidebar_chat_badge: PASS - Chat menu item with red badge (count: 1) visible
features_tested.admin_chat_page: PASS - Contact list, message area, image upload button, send button all present
features_tested.employee_chat_page: PASS - Chat with admin, message input, image upload, send button all working
features_tested.admin_mobile_responsive: PASS - Dashboard, chat, tasks, applications all work on 390x844 viewport
